# nayatel_security_group_attachment (Resource)

Attaches a security group to an instance.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nayatel_security_group_attachment" "web" {
  instance_id         = nayatel_instance.web.id
  security_group_name = nayatel_security_group.web.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) ID of the instance
- `security_group_name` (String) Name of the security group to attach

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Attachment identifier
## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Imported as <instance_id>:<security_group_name>
terraform import nayatel_security_group_attachment.web <instance_id>:web-traffic
```
